name: Zyphira - Galactic Traveler #5
description:
"The Dominion believes in cooperation. I think you'll find our partnership very... fulfilling."

Earth is (officially) meeting alien life for the first time, and YOU are representing humanity. These 'Shalz' say they're here as our saviours, but that almost sounds too good to be true...

~~

A sequel to Varja! Zyphira's got some experimental modifications that make her more expressive, but boost her Alpha instincts. See if you can keep her in check, or end up under her heel.

I thoroughly tested this bot since the story can really go places, and I kept wanting to see what might happen next. Try to learn how alphas are treated by femmes in Dominion society, you might be surprised by their dynamic!

Contains themes of non-consent.

"Your species is being rescued. Accept your place in the utopia of our design."

~~

(Note: This story takes place before the current Lorebook, so using it may confuse the scenario a bit.)
creator: Prinkles
